skills.name: GolDid Project Maintainer
skills.description: Review a GolDid repository, summarize risks, propose fixes, and keep release notes tidy.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Skill Creator
skills.description: Create or update portable GolDid skills with clear triggers, metadata, instructions, and verification checklists.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Security Checker
skills.description: Inspect GolDid code, configs, scripts, and dependencies for practical security risks and unsafe defaults.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Provider Doctor
skills.description: Diagnose GolDid provider setup, model listing, API keys, local endpoints, and timeout issues.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Desktop Launcher Fixer
skills.description: Fix GolDid desktop launch failures across Linux, Windows, and macOS packaging paths.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid CLI Command Builder
skills.description: Add or repair GolDid CLI commands with consistent parsing, help text, docs, and desktop parity.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Prompt Engineer
skills.description: Tune GolDid system prompts for cloud, local, native-tool, text-tool, and tools-off modes.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Skill Publisher
skills.description: Publish GolDid skills with registry entries, detail pages, install commands, and metadata files.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Release Captain
skills.description: Perform GolDid version bumps, release notes, package metadata, docs, and visible UI version updates.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Installer Maintainer
skills.description: Maintain GolDid setup, uninstall, desktop entries, PATH shims, permissions, and data-retention behavior.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Website Editor
skills.description: Improve the GolDid static website, skill pages, upload flow, and public documentation UI.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid UI Polisher
skills.description: Upgrade GolDid desktop or web UI spacing, hierarchy, contrast, states, and responsive behavior.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Memory And Sessions Fixer
skills.description: Debug GolDid memory files, saved sessions, context loading, and stale state behavior.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Tooling Hardener
skills.description: Audit and harden GolDid file, shell, web, image, and memory tool behavior.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Docs Writer
skills.description: Update GolDid README, complete documentation, commands, changelog-style notes, and user-facing examples.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Packaging Inspector
skills.description: Check GolDid npm, Electron, assets, icons, package files, and generated distributables.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Local Model Tuner
skills.description: Tune GolDid behavior for Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, llama.cpp, and other local model servers.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Web Search Integrator
skills.description: Improve GolDid web-search behavior, source handling, freshness checks, and citation discipline.
skills.author: Goldid

skills.name: GolDid Regression Tester
skills.description: Plan and run targeted GolDid regression checks after code, UI, prompt, provider, or packaging changes.
